guardrails.title: Limit Query Depth and Complexity
guardrails.body: Query depth and complexity shall have upper bounds. Unbounded nesting can cause denial-of-service.

guardrails.title: No Exposing Internal Errors
guardrails.body: GraphQL error responses shall not contain internal error details (stack traces, database errors, etc.). Prevent information leakage to attackers.

guardrails.title: Authorize at Field and Relation Level
guardrails.body: Authorization checks shall be applied at the field and relation level, not only at root resolvers. Accessing unauthorized data through relation traversal is prohibited.
